metaDescription: Clinique du VR privacy policy for contact requests, appointments and customer communications.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.body: Clinique du VR protects the information voluntarily shared through email, phone calls, the contact form and booking requests.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: When you contact us, we may collect your name, email address, phone number, details about your RV and any information needed to understand your service request.

sections.heading: How the information is used
sections.body: This information is used to reply to your request, plan an appointment, prepare an estimate or follow up on an inspection, maintenance or repair file.

sections.heading: Compliance and retention
sections.body: The site is designed to support a minimal approach to personal information handling and to align with applicable Quebec Law 25 requirements. We do not sell personal information and only use the information needed to process your request.

sections.heading: Cookies, tracking and navigation
sections.body: The site does not use Google Ads, Google Analytics or other advertising or analytics trackers. No advertising cookies are placed and no browsing information is retained to profile users.

sections.heading: Questions
sections.body: For privacy questions or requests related to your information, email info@cliniqueduvr.ca or call (581) 337-3366.
